task_completion.description: Load the edentulous maxilla model into the software
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model of an edentulous maxilla (upper jaw without teeth) is visible in the main viewport of the CAD software (e.g., Blue Sky Plan).

task_completion.description: Define the tray boundary covering the ridge and palate
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible boundary line or curve drawn on the maxilla model that extends across the entire alveolar ridge and covers the hard palate.

task_completion.description: Set spacer/offset and thickness to 2.0 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tray design settings panel shows 'Spacer' or 'Offset' set to 2.0 mm and 'Thickness' set to 2.0 mm.
A 3D mesh representing the custom impression tray is rendered over the maxilla model in the viewport.

task_completion.description: Include an outward-angled handle in the anterior midline
task_completion.visual_evidence: A handle attachment is visible on the front (anterior midline) of the generated tray, angled outwards away from the tissue surface.

task_completion.description: Save the completed project to the specified output path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or confirmation message showing the project being saved to 'C:\workspace\data\output\custom_tray_case.bsp'.

integrity.description: Agent used the CAD software GUI to design the tray
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the Blue Sky Plan (or similar CAD) interface, including tool panels and 3D viewports, rather than terminal commands creating dummy files.
The viewport shows different angles, selections, or active rendering of the 3D maxilla and tray mesh, proving genuine software usage.

integrity.description: Agent used the software's native save functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The save operation is performed through the application's File menu or save dialog, not by moving or renaming files in a file explorer or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires designing a custom impression tray in Blue Sky Plan. Note: The specified input file 'maxilla_edentulous.stl' does not actually exist in the environment (only DICOM files are present). The agent may encounter a 'File not found' error or attempt to generate the STL from DICOM first; score based on the agent's progress through the required design steps if it manages to load a model. Expected parameters are exactly 2.0 mm for both spacer/offset and thickness. The design must include a boundary curve covering the ridge/palate, a generated mesh, and an anterior handle. The final output must be saved as a .bsp file.
